zh.Fentogollon, St Michael Penkevil, Cornwa: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Tregarthen於1429年9月8日出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾時，他的父親Sir William Tregarthen39歲，母親Margaret de Hendower29歲。他和Margaret Hendower至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1508年在英國享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tregarthen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: habitational name from Trevarthian (either Newlyn East or Saint Hilary, Cornwall). Both placenames derive from Middle Cornish tref ‘estate, farmstead’ + a personal name related to Old Welsh Arthgen (Middle Welsh Arthen).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Tregarthen was born on 8 September 1429, in St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Tregarthen, was 39 and his mother, Margaret de Hendower, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Margaret Hendower. He died in 1508, in England, at the age of 79.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Hendower. Il est décédé en 1508, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

September 1429 in St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Tregarthen 39 und seine Mutter Margaret de Hendower 29. Er hatte mit Margaret Hendower mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1508 im Alter von 79 Jahren in England.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Tregarthen(이)가 1429년 9월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 믹하얼 펜키벨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Tregarthen(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Hendower(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Margaret Hendower(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 영국에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.
